channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sgt Fannie Nkosi charged with tampering and obstruction in Limpopo
item.description: Sgt Fannie Nkosi, previously arrested following his appearance at the Madlanga commission of inquiry, is now facing additional charges. According to National Police spokesperson Brig Athlenda Mathe, N...

item.title: Columnists Analyze the Final California Gubernatorial Debate and Candidate Performance
item.description: The final debate among California's leading gubernatorial candidates, held in San Francisco, offered little to shift the dynamics of the race. Columnists Gustavo Arellano, Mark Z. Barabak, and Anita C...

item.title: Tanzania advances plan to expand national water supply network
item.description: Tanzania is making good progress on its national water grid plan, which aims to improve water distribution across the country. The government is pushing forward initiatives to connect more regions to ...

item.title: EPRA Announces Petrol and Diesel Price Increases in May-June 2026
item.description: In its latest monthly review, the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) announced that petrol and diesel prices in Kenya will increase, effective May 15, 2026. Super petrol will go up by Sh...

item.title: Conservative Critique Labels House Speaker Mike Johnson as Too Submissive to White House
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, a Republican from Louisiana, has been sharply criticized by conservative commentator Joe Perticone in The Bulwark. Perticone's article argues that Johnson’s tenure as Speak...

item.title: APC to Hold Direct Primaries Amid Internal Party Tensions
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don decide to hold direct primaries for the House of Representatives elections as resistance dey rise from party members wey no gree for consensus method. This na a...

item.title: Jessica Sanchez to Perform Exclusive Show for Filipino Fans in Manila
item.description: Filipino-American singer Jessica Sanchez is gearing up to give her fans in the Philippines a memorable evening during her upcoming Manila concert. Known for her powerful vocals and emotional performan...

item.title: Green Party leader acknowledges missing local election vote
item.description: Zack Polanski, the leader of the Green Party, has publicly admitted that he did not participate in the recent local elections. This revelation has attracted attention given his position as the head of...

item.title: Kenya Maintains Border Closure with Somalia Due to Rising Security and Political Tensions
item.description: Kenya has decided to keep its border with Somalia closed due to escalating security and political instability in Somalia. President William Ruto stated that although there were plans to reopen the bor...

item.title: Celine Dion's First Visit to Paris in 1982 and Her Early French Success
item.description: On July 10, 1982, 14-year-old Celine Dion traveled to Paris for the first time to promote her album 'Tellement j’ai d’amour.' During this visit, she was photographed at iconic Parisian landmarks like ...

item.title: Trump and Xi Hold Second Day of Beijing Talks, Focus on Iran and Bilateral Relations
item.description: President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping continued their high-level discussions on the second day in Beijing at the Zhongnanhai compound, a venue chosen by Xi to reciprocate Trump's 201...

item.title: Police caution public on responsible firearm handling after viral video
item.description: A video has recently circulated on social media showing two women mishandling and cocking firearms inside a residential property. The South African Police Service (SAPS) condemned the clip, emphasisin...

item.title: Practical Tips for Refreshing an Old Staircase
item.description: Updating a home can feel overwhelming, but not every project requires extensive renovations. One often-overlooked area is the staircase, which connects different floors but can easily show signs of ag...

item.title: Xi warns Trump mishandling Taiwan could endanger China-US relations
item.description: On Thursday, China's President Xi Jinping meet U.S. President Donald Trump for important summit in Beijing. Xi warn Trump say if both countries no handle Taiwan issue well, e fit push relations to 've...

item.title: Trump reportedly considers a fund to compensate allies affected by previous administration actions
item.description: A recent report has sparked significant online debate over President Donald Trump's proposed plan to establish a $1.7 billion fund to compensate allies who claim they were unfairly targeted by the Bid...

item.title: Global Updates: Iran urges BRICS on US, US boosts UN aid, Kenya hikes fuel prices, and other developments
item.description: On Friday, May 15, 2026, several important international events dey unfold. For New Delhi, Iran dey push other BRICS nations make dem condemn US and Israel over wetin Iran call violations of internati...

item.title: Montreal Victoire wins Game 1 of Walter Cup final with overtime goal by Abby Roque
item.description: In a thrilling start to the Walter Cup final, the Montreal Victoire edged the Ottawa Charge 3-2 in overtime during Game 1 at Place Bell. Abby Roque scored the decisive goal just 2:29 into overtime aft...

item.title: Colorado Officials Refute Republican Candidate’s Exaggerated Claims About Venezuelan Gang
item.description: Colorado state Representative Scott Bottoms, a Republican gubernatorial candidate, claimed that the Venezuelan transnational criminal gang Tren de Aragua (TdA) has 45,000 to 50,000 members operating i...

item.title: Ten Notable New Books Across Fiction and Non-Fiction
item.description: This week’s book reviews cover a diverse selection spanning horror, romcom, medical drama, history, and nature. In fiction, Stephen Graham Jones’ 'The Ones Who Got Away' delivers 13 horror stories tha...

item.title: Virat Kohli’s Enduring Excellence in Cricket
item.description: At 37 years of age, Virat Kohli continues to demonstrate exceptional skill and determination in cricket, showing no signs of slowing down. His unbeaten century in the recent IPL match against Kolkata ...
